title: Close security, observability and deployment checks
goals: Prevent secret and sensitive payload leaks through browser state, logs and tool trace.
Ensure operator-visible request id, run id and conversation id are available.
Document production environment variables, reverse proxy rules and rollback.
non_goals: Do not commit host-specific secrets or compose files.
Do not enable Copilot Cloud persistence or telemetry by default.
acceptance: Browser-visible state excludes session cookie, gateway token, raw actor context, raw PII, UNC paths and full DOM.
CopilotKit telemetry is disabled by default.
Deployment docs include /copilotkit reverse proxy and timeout checks.
Rollback to LOCAL_BUSINESS_AI_UI_DRIVER=legacy is documented and tested.
